playbook.intent: Take a recurring custom engagement and convert it into a named, fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with a public landing page, sales script, delivery SOP, and at least one paying customer.
playbook.scope: Take a recurring custom engagement and convert it into a named, fixed-scope, fixed-price productized service with a public landing page, sales script, delivery SOP, and at least one paying customer.

success-criteria.criterion: All 6 stages have written outputs in the project record
Each stage's decision gate was answered before advancing (yes / no in writing)
Final stage produced the required written decision artifact
Every methodology reference loaded cleanly via `faion get-content`

stage.name: Discover
stage.intent: Pick the recurring engagement to productize.

tasks.task: Audit last 6 months of project work and tag repeated scope patterns
Pick one bundle that you've delivered ≥3 times with positive margin
Interview 5 past clients on the painful before-state

stage.decision-gate: Advance only if one candidate scored ≥3 repeats AND ≥3 client confirmations.

stage.name: Scope & Price
stage.intent: Lock fixed scope and fixed price.

tasks.task: Draft the productized-service canvas (problem, deliverables, exclusions, timeline)
Run a cost build-up; set price at 3-4x your direct delivery cost
Define 3 explicit non-goals to protect scope

stage.decision-gate: Advance if margin model clears target gross margin and scope fits on one page.

stage.name: Landing & Sales Script

tasks.task: Build single-page landing with outcome-led copy and one CTA
Write a sales-call script (problem, deliverables, price, objections, close)
Set conversion tracking on the CTA

stage.decision-gate: Advance when landing converts at least one qualified lead per 50 visits.

stage.name: Delivery SOP

tasks.task: Document the delivery workflow as a numbered SOP with checkpoints
Define handover artifacts at each checkpoint
Write the case-study template the SOP outputs by default

stage.decision-gate: Advance when a contractor can follow the SOP unaided to checkpoint 1.

stage.name: First Paid Sale
stage.intent: Convert one prospect end-to-end at the fixed price.

tasks.task: Run outbound to 20 warm prospects with the new landing
Hold sales calls using the script; do not discount the fixed price
Sign one fixed-price contract and kick off delivery

stage.decision-gate: Advance when 1 client has paid the first invoice.

stage.name: Learn & Iterate
stage.intent: Capture what the first sale taught.

tasks.task: Compare delivered scope vs canvas — log every overage
Update SOP, landing copy, and price for the next cycle
Decide: scale this productized offering, or kill and pick another

stage.decision-gate: Required output: a written scale-or-kill decision with evidence.
